zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg於1145年出生在歐登伯格時，他的父親Christian I Count of Oldenburg22歲，母親Kunigunde von Versfleth20歲。他和Salome von Are-Hochstaden至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1209年在德國福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格阿赤 歐登伯格歐登伯格拉斯泰德拉斯泰德享年64歲，埋葬在德國福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格阿赤 歐登伯格歐登伯格拉斯泰德。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Oldenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Claus, Hans, Jurgen, Ruediger.

North German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Oldenburg, the capital of the former principality of the same name, from the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of Middle Low German ald, old ‘old’ + burg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Moritz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg was born in 1145, in Oldenburg, his father, Christian I Count of Oldenburg, was 22 and his mother, Kunigunde von Versfleth, was 20. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Salome von Are-Hochstaden. He died in 1209, in Rastede, Rastede, Oldenburg, Oldenburg, Oldenburg, Germany, at the age of 64, and was buried in Rastede, Oldenburg, Oldenburg, Oldenburg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg est né en 1145, à Oldenburg, son père, Christian I Count of Oldenburg, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde von Versfleth, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Salome von Are-Hochstaden. Il est décédé en 1209, à Rastede, Rastede, Oldenburg, Amt Oldenburg, Freistaat Oldenburg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Rastede, Oldenburg, Amt Oldenburg, Freistaat Oldenburg, Allemagne.

Er hatte mit Salome von Are-Hochstaden mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1209 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Rastede, Rastede, Oldenburg, Amt Oldenburg, Freistaat Oldenburg, Deutschland und wurde in Rastede, Oldenburg, Amt Oldenburg, Freistaat Oldenburg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg è nato il nel 1145 nel Oldenburg, il suo padre, Christian I Count of Oldenburg, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Kunigunde von Versfleth, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Salome von Are-Hochstaden. Morì nel 1209, nel Rastede, Rastede, Oldenburg, Amt Oldenburg, Freistaat Oldenburg, Germania, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Rastede, Oldenburg, Amt Oldenburg, Freistaat Oldenburg, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg(이)가 1145년 덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christian I Count of Oldenburg(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Kunigunde von Versfleth(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Salome von Are-Hochstaden(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1209년 독일 프레이스타앳 덴버그 아트 덴버그 덴버그 라스테드 라스테드에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레이스타앳 덴버그 아트 덴버그 덴버그 라스테드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg nasceu em 1145, em Oldenburg, seu pai, Christian I Count of Oldenburg, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde von Versfleth, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Salome von Are-Hochstaden. Ele faleceu em 1209, em Rastede, Rastede, Oldenburg, Amt Oldenburg, Freistaat Oldenburg, Alemanha, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Rastede, Oldenburg, Amt Oldenburg, Freistaat Oldenburg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg родился в 1145 г. в местности олденбург, его отцу по имени Christian I Count of Oldenburg было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde von Versfleth, 20. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Salome von Are-Hochstaden. Он умер в 1209 г. в местности растед, растед, олденбург, амт олденбург, фристаат олденбург, Германия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности растед, олденбург, амт олденбург, фристаат олденбург, Германия.
